details.summary: Original had blocking issues (inline route tests, missing express.raw()). Both fixed in fix-voice-stt-route: tests now import actual sttRoutes module, server.ts has express.raw() middleware scoped to /api/stt.
TTS server meets all expected behaviors. Three non-blocking issues noted (request size limit, retry logic, input validation).

Original had 3 blocking issues (useState-as-cleanup at lines 197 and 379, permission-denied status overwritten by setError). All fixed: both replaced with useEffect, setError preserves permission-denied status.

Fix adequately addresses both original blocking issues. STT route tests use real route module, express.raw() middleware added. One non-blocking issue: test setup doesn't include express.json() (harmless for audio content types).
Fix adequately addresses all three original blocking issues. useState → useEffect for cleanup, setError preserves permission-denied status with new test. Minimal diff (+23/-6 across 3 files).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add coding convention: 'Always use useEffect for cleanup functions on unmount, never useState. useState only stores return values as state, it does not call the returned function as cleanup.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: voice-ui-controls: VoiceControls.tsx uses useState(() => { return () => cleanup }) at lines 197 and 379 — cleanup never executes. Fixed in fix-voice-controls-cleanup.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add pitfall documentation: 'When using setError in a store that also manages status, be aware that setStatus transitions may be overwritten. For specific status values like permission-denied, either use setStatus without setError, or modify setError to preserve specific status values.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: voice-ui-controls: voiceStore.ts setError overwrites 'permission-denied' to 'error', preventing dedicated UI. Fixed in fix-voice-controls-cleanup with functional state update.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Replace hardcoded absolute paths for STT and TTS services with relative paths from repo root.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: STT service: 'cd /Users/stefano/repos/open-marcus/servers/stt && node server.mjs --port 8765'. TTS service: similar pattern. These will break on any other machine or CI.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance to backend-worker skill for handling TDD with separate-process integrations (e.g., external servers that cannot be unit-tested with Vitest mocking). Clarify when manual testing vs automated testing is acceptable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix worker (fix-voice-stt-route) followed TDD correctly with proper test setup, unlike the original voice-stt-server worker.

rejectedObservations.observation: RecordingIndicator component is dead code (never imported)
Test suite missing express.json() middleware (harmless for audio content types)
